case_title: LISA ZASLOVE VS. NICHOLAS PETRUCCI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZASLOVE, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETRUCCI, NICHOLAS BLIZZARD, ZACHARY KANE, JOSHUA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 642 CENTRAL AVENUE, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
